violations.text: The condensate from the walk-in cooler #2 is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other non-sewage liquids must drain into a drain. Solutions for "fix/adjustment" were discussed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/28/2023
